constraints.expression: consumer executes prs_to_revert + beads_to_reopen + env_changes_to_undo in declared order; an empty rollback plan is valid (no-op rollback)
constraints.message: Rollback ordering is consumer-side; the schema admits empty arrays as no-op rollbacks.
constraints.evaluation_note: Rollback execution semantics are consumer-side per ADR-010. The schema enforces the structural shape of each step (40-hex git SHA, non-empty repo + bead_id, nullable previous_value); the execution order and idempotency story are the consumer's responsibility. Runtime-deferred classification surfaces the obligation so consumers see the execution-policy hook.
